name: Background Ripple Effect
summary: An interactive grid background where clicked cells trigger expanding ripple animations across neighboring cells.
detailedDescription: Background Ripple Effect creates an interactive grid of cells (default 8 rows x 27 cols, 56px each) that respond to clicks with ripple animations. When a cell is clicked, the effect propagates outward based on Euclidean distance from click point. Each cell calculates delay and duration CSS variables based on distance, creating expanding wave effect. The component uses CSS mask-image (radial-from-20% at top) and opacity for visual containment. Dark mode support via CSS custom properties for border (neutral-700), fill (neutral-900), and shadow (neutral-800) colors. Light mode uses neutral-300/100/500. Grid renders via CSS grid with explicit cellSize dimensions. Interactive mode enables click handlers that trigger rippleKey state update, forcing grid re-render with new clickedCell reference. This creates engaging, tactile background where user interactions create visible ripple patterns across the grid surface, ideal for interactive installations, playful backgrounds, or any context where click-responsive surfaces enhance engagement.
purpose: Create click-responsive grid with ripple propagation
Animate cells based on distance from click point
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
Use as a supporting atmospheric layer rather than the primary layout structure.
